---
title: "People"
description: "Important people, relationships, and agent handles"
---

# Key People

- Fernando Arriaga: Co-Founder and CEO — GitHub handle: `fernandoarriagau`
- Williams Verde: Co-Founder and CTO — GitHub handle: `sparkiq-git`
- Diego Olalde: Co-Founder and Head of Innovation — GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq`

# Agent Handles

- Dev agent GitHub handle (your own): `TODO: add Jeff's GitHub username`
- PM agent GitHub handle (Sparky): `TODO: add Sparky's GitHub username`
- Code review agent GitHub handle: `TODO: add code review agent GitHub username`
